channel.title: admin on JD the ocean geochemist
channel.description: Recent content in admin on JD the ocean geochemist

item.description: I’m a PhD student in Ocean Ecology and Biogeochemistry at CEOAS, OSU. I study trace elements and this isotopes (TEIs) in the ocean and their applications in understanding present and past ocean changes. I’m especially interested in the cycling of TEIs across the sediment-water interface, and its effect on the budgets of TEIs in the modern ocean and the use of TEIs as paleoclimate proxies.
